mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO df_task_edge (task_id, task_version_id, source_node_key, target_node_key, condition_expr, sort_order) VALUES
(#{edge.taskId}, #{edge.taskVersionId}, #{edge.sourceNodeKey}, #{edge.targetNodeKey}, #{edge.conditionExpr}, #{edge.sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE df_task_edge SET deleted = 1 WHERE task_version_id = #{taskVersionId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, task_version_id, source_node_key, target_node_key, condition_expr, sort_order, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM df_task_edge WHERE task_version_id = #{taskVersionId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
